question: The line chart shows revenue from 1924 to 2024. Which statement best describes the main difficulty in interpreting this chart?

options.A: The chart is too small to clearly see precise revenue changes between different years and decades.
options.D: Revenue increased at the same rate every decade.

explanation: Revenue declined from 1980 to 1990. The extremely small axis labels can make it hard to read which period had the decline.
